e(D)end,function(o)for s=780305+-780304,#o,-31679+31680 do i[o[s]]=(199286-199285)+i[o[s]]end if y then local r=y(true)local e=n(r)e[s(677131+-677399)],e[s(-429784+429549)],e[s(220879+-221151)]=o,b,function()return-121274+-3234511 end return r else return x({},{[s(-963764-(-963529))]=b;[s(-297338-(-297070))]=o,[s(-648905-(-648633))]=function()return 1044281+-4400066 end})end end,function(o,s)local e=p(s)local y=function(y,x,n,G,D)return r(o,{y;x,n,G,D},s,e)end return y end return(P(926093+11632488,{}))(e(D))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[s(390564-390808)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
